what_it_does: Records metadata for an image asset named p-03 in the design-source channel, identifying it as a JPEG design ground-truth slide from a 15-page presentation.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger record for an image asset
id is presentation-15p/p-03 and address is image://design-source/presentation-15p/p-03
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body content states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-03.jpg'
standouts: width and height are 0 despite being an image record
blob URI includes a content hash
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed ledger schema
Records provenance via source and author_session fields
Separates machine metadata from a short human-readable source note
concerns: width and height are 0, suggesting placeholder or unextracted dimensions
links array is empty, so no relationships are captured
body provides no description of what the slide depicts
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a presentation slide image, with placeholder dimensions and a ground-truth source tag.
questions: What visual or textual content does slide p-03 contain?
How does this slide relate to the other 14 pages of presentation-15p?
What is the role of author_session ch-3mpkjg3r?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to catalog a design-source image asset; the actual content is a minimal metadata stub with zero dimensions and no descriptive content, so it records identity and provenance rather than describing the image.
intention_signals: To register a specific presentation slide image as a trusted, retrievable design-source artifact that can be linked to related materials and used as a reference in downstream fusion or review.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier, retrieval address, blob reference, and source provenance for one slide image in a presentation deck, enabling later linking and ground-truth comparison.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata stub for a JPEG image asset p-03 in the design-source channel, part of presentation-15p, tagged as design ground-truth with zero width and height.
intention_for_embedding: Catalog a specific presentation slide image as a retrievable, attributable design-source artifact.
